hiver.name: Hiver
hiver.short_description: Hiver is an omnichannel customer service platform that unifies email, chat, Slack, voice, and WhatsApp with AI agents and automation.
hiver.starting_price: Free plan available; paid plans from $25/user/month (Growth, billed annually)

features.description: Consolidates email, chat, Slack, voice, and WhatsApp into one shared inbox.
features.title: Omnichannel inbox

features.description: Execute multi-step support procedures across integrated tools.
features.title: AI Agents

features.description: Assists with ticket triage, reply drafting, and task execution.
features.title: AI Copilot

features.description: Auto-generates help articles from resolved tickets.
features.title: AI Help Center

features.description: Monitors quality and tracks customer health signals.
features.title: AI Insights

features.description: Rule-based and agentic automation for routing and assignment.
features.title: Workflow automation

features.description: Connects with Salesforce, Shopify, NetSuite, and 10,000+ tools.
features.title: Native integrations

pros: Wide channel coverage (email, chat, Slack, voice, WhatsApp) in one inbox
Free tier available before committing to a paid plan
AI copilot and AI agents built into paid tiers for ticket handling
Native integrations with Salesforce, Shopify, and NetSuite
cons: Advanced AI features (AI QA, AI insights, AI knowledge builder) are limited to the top Elite plan
Minimum of 2 seats required, jumping to 5-seat increments beyond that
Per-seat pricing rises quickly across tiers, from $25 to $85/user/month annually

faqs.answer: Yes, Hiver offers a permanently free tier with shared inbox and ticketing for email, chat, and help center channels.
faqs.question: Does Hiver have a free plan?

faqs.answer: The Growth plan starts at $25/user/month billed annually, or $35/user/month billed monthly.
faqs.question: What is the cheapest paid Hiver plan?

faqs.answer: Yes; AI agents and AI copilot are included from the Growth plan up, with AI QA and AI insights added on the Elite plan.
faqs.question: Does Hiver include AI features?

faqs.answer: Hiver lists native integrations with Salesforce, Shopify, NetSuite, and over 10,000 tools.
faqs.question: What integrations does Hiver support?

features: Email, chat, and help center channels
